name: knowledge-writing-config
description: Store or retrieve writing configuration in the knowledge graph. Use 'store' to save a configuration value (e.g. writing_guide_url, essays_index_url). Use 'retrieve' to fetch all stored writing configuration values. Agents and coordinators use this to share deploy-agnostic writing workflow config that the CEO provides via chat.

inputs.field: string? (required for store — the config field name, e.g. 'writing_guide_url', 'essays_index_url')
inputs.value: string? (required for store — the config value)

outputs.stored: boolean? (true when a value was persisted)
outputs.config: array? (for retrieve — list of {field, value} objects)
